title: sida limensis
intro: Sida limensis, also known as the False Mallow or Limensis Mallow, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sida limensis include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Sida limensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the roots and leaves in tincture or capsule form.
